MODULE: cosmos.integration.vtuber.d_id_avatar
FILE: cosmos/integration/vtuber/d_id_avatar.py (614 lines)
CATEGORY: integration

DESCRIPTION: D-ID Avatar Integration - Generates talking avatar videos with lip sync.
Uses ElevenLabs for audio + D-ID for avatar rendering.

CLASSES:
- DIDConfig: D-ID API configuration
- DIDAvatar: D-ID Avatar renderer - creates talking head videos from audio.

Flow:
1. Text → 
  Methods: async def close(self)
  Methods: async def get_credits(self) -> dict
  Methods: async def list_presenters(self) -> list
  Methods: async def upload_audio(self, audio_path: str) -> Optional[str]
  Methods: async def upload_image(self, image_path: str) -> Optional[str]
  Methods: async def set_avatar(self, image_path: str) -> bool
  Methods: async def create_talk_from_audio(self, audio_path: str, presenter_id: Optional[str]=None, driver_url
  Methods: async def create_talk_from_text(self, text: str, voice_id: str='en-US-GuyNeural', presenter_id: Opti
- ElevenLabsDIDPipeline: Full pipeline: Text → ElevenLabs (audio) → D-ID (video with lip sync)

This offl
  Methods: async def generate_elevenlabs_audio(self, text: str) -> Optional[str]
  Methods: async def generate_video(self, text: str, download: bool=True) -> Tuple[Optional[str], Optional[str]
  Methods: async def close(self)

PUBLIC FUNCTIONS:
- async def test_did_api()
